hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); fname=$(printf '%s' "$branch" | tr / -); expected="prd/branch commit updates/${fname}.md"; if git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qxF "$expected"; then exit 0; else echo "Pre-commit hook: progress log is not staged. Per CLAUDE.md, prepend an entry to 'prd/branch commit updates/${fname}.md' and stage it before committing." >&2; exit 2; fi
